actions.name: Validate JSON
actions.description: Validates JSON files for specific criteria, including checking for empty 'author' fields, ensuring ID lengths are exactly six characters (excluding specified IDs), identifying duplicate IDs, and detecting duplicate port values in module options. It provides detailed feedback on any issues found during the validation process. The results are summarized in the GitHub Actions step summary.

actions.name: Build Debian
actions.description: Builds Debian packages for Armbian, specifically the armbian-config package, using a defined matrix and compilation script. Executes unit tests after the build process, contingent on the repository owner being Armbian.

actions.name: Build docs
actions.description: Builds documentation and a main JSON file for the project. Assembles modules and jobs for production, generates documentation using a configuration tool, and creates a pull request for the updates. The process includes automatic updates to documentation and JSON files, ensuring they are reviewed and merged appropriately.

actions.name: Check coding style
actions.description: Checks coding style for pull requests by running an EditorConfig checker. It ensures that code adheres to specified formatting rules, helping maintain code quality and consistency across contributions.
actions.execution_method: pull_request events (opened, reopened, edited, synchronize, review_requested)

actions.name: Clean workflow logs
actions.description: Cleans up workflow logs by deleting runs older than a specified number of days, helping to manage storage and maintain a tidy environment. It can be executed on a schedule or manually with input parameters for customization.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 0:00, on Mon

actions.name: Community welcome issue
actions.description: Generates a welcome message for first-time contributors when they open an issue. It labels the issue as 'Good first issue' and sends a personalized message to encourage engagement with the project. This enhances community interaction and supports new contributors.

actions.name: Desktop matrix audit
actions.description: Performs a periodic audit of the desktop YAML matrix against upstream package availability and unsupported releases. Generates a detailed report and, if actionable issues are found, utilizes Claude Code to propose YAML edits and opens a pull request with the changes. The audit includes checks for missing releases and package holes, providing a summary of the findings.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 6:00, on Mon

actions.name: Lint
actions.description: Analyzes shell scripts for linting errors using Shellcheck, focusing on files that have changed in a pull request or all shell scripts if none have changed. Reports lint errors in a diff format, ensuring only bash scripts are checked. Outputs a summary of the checked files.

actions.name: PR auto-label
actions.description: Automatically labels pull requests based on size, file categories, and creation date, while also removing the 'Ready to merge' label when updates occur. It categorizes PRs using a predefined configuration and assigns size labels based on the number of changed lines. Additionally, it tracks PR creation dates to apply quarterly labels.

actions.name: PR label on approval
actions.description: Labels pull requests as 'Ready to merge' upon successful approval and removes specified review-related labels. It fetches the pull request number from a previous workflow's artifact and updates the labels accordingly. A comment is added to indicate the approval status.

actions.name: PR listen review
actions.description: Saves the pull request number when a review is approved and uploads it as an artifact. It facilitates tracking and managing approved pull requests for maintenance purposes.

actions.name: Stale
actions.description: Closes inactive issues by marking them as stale after a period of inactivity and subsequently closing them if no updates are made. It sends notifications to contributors about the status of their issues. This helps maintain a clean and active issue tracker.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 12:00, on Mon

actions.name: Sync labels
actions.description: Syncs labels from a YAML file to issues and pull requests based on modifications. Applies labels defined in '.github/labels.yml' to relevant pull requests and issues, ensuring consistent labeling across the repository.
actions.execution_method: workflow_dispatch, push to main branch affecting .github/labels.yml, pull_request affecting .github/labels.yml

actions.name: Unit tests
actions.description: Runs unit tests on Armbian configurations across multiple architectures and releases. Generates a test matrix based on enabled test cases, executing them in native or emulated environments as needed. Outputs results in JSON format for aggregation and reporting.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 2:00

actions.name: Watchdog (cronjob)
actions.description: Reruns failed jobs for specified workflows on a scheduled basis or manually. It checks the status of previous runs and attempts to restart them if they have failed or been cancelled, up to a defined number of attempts. This ensures that critical workflows are consistently executed and any issues are addressed promptly.
